name: hivemq-study
description: Monorepo study: microfrontend-ready Next.js + Java Spring Boot + HiveMQ CE.

scripts.backend:dev: set -a && [ -f .env ] && . ./.env && set +a && export JAVA_HOME=/opt/homebrew/opt/openjdk@21 && export PATH=/opt/homebrew/opt/openjdk@21/bin:"$PATH" && cd apps/backend && ./mvnw spring-boot:run
scripts.backend:test: export JAVA_HOME=/opt/homebrew/opt/openjdk@21 && export PATH=/opt/homebrew/opt/openjdk@21/bin:"$PATH" && cd apps/backend && ./mvnw test
scripts.backend:build: export JAVA_HOME=/opt/homebrew/opt/openjdk@21 && export PATH=/opt/homebrew/opt/openjdk@21/bin:"$PATH" && cd apps/backend && ./mvnw -DskipTests package
